meta.ranking_policy: School-meals rankings are generated from this JSON; missing values excluded; derived ratio is indicative only.
meta.source_policy: Generated from official school-meals / education XLSX or CSV exports placed in raw/school_meals/. Included raw snapshots are used as stable fallback when portal bulk download is not available.

school_meals_total_children.source: GCNF, Global Survey of School Meal Programs (2024)

primary_enrollment_children.source: GCNF, Global Survey of School Meal Programs (2024)

school_meal_children_per_primary_enrollm.source: Derived from school-meals and education indicators
school_meal_children_per_primary_enrollm.note: Indicative ratio only; denominator is primary enrollment and may not match exact program target population.
